scripts.dev:worker: dotenv -e .env -- sh -c 'cd apps/backend && celery -A app.workers.celery_app worker --loglevel=info --concurrency=4 -Q utility,marketing'
scripts.dev:beat: dotenv -e .env -- sh -c 'cd apps/backend && celery -A app.workers.celery_app beat --loglevel=info'
scripts.dev:flower: dotenv -e .env -- sh -c 'cd apps/backend && celery -A app.workers.celery_app flower --port=5555'
scripts.setup:backend: cd apps/backend && python -m venv .venv && .venv/bin/pip install -r requirements.txt
